stemHtml: The pilot`s control input in a Fly-By-Wire system is…

options.a: linked by mechanical cables directly to the flight control surface.
options.b: converted into an electrical signal and linked via the Electronic Control Unit (ECU) to the flight control surface.
options.c: linked mechanically to a computer and then to the flight control surface.
options.d: converted into an electrical signal and linked to the Electronic Engine Control (EEC) to the flight control surface.
